Hero.tagline: A Scholarly Institution for Classical Islamic & Arabic Studies
Hero.headline: Pairing Traditional Isnad with Rigorous Academic Specialization
Hero.description: Receive verified Islamic sciences, classical Arabic, and correct Quranic recitation live on Zoom. Every lesson relies on direct oral reception and chains of transmission (Isnad), mentored by certified scholars from Al-Azhar University in the language you think in.

Credibility.title: Standards of Authenticity & Academic Vetting at Tebyan
Credibility.diff1Desc: All teachers are certified scholars and reciters from prestigious traditional institutions, led by Al-Azhar University.
Credibility.diff2Desc: Instruction is built entirely on oral transmission, where the scholar focuses solely on correcting your pronunciation and understanding.
Credibility.diff3Desc: Scholars are fluent in Arabic, English, or French, allowing complex theological concepts to be explained in your native context.
Credibility.diff4Desc: Traditional systems relying on certified Ijazat with verified chains of transmission (Isnad) back to the Prophet ﷺ.
Credibility.diff5Desc: Dedicated coordination team matches your private sessions to your professional schedule across all global time zones.

Programs.title: Academic Programs
Programs.subtitle: Structured paths designed for systematic, comprehensive, and text-grounded Islamic scholarship.
Programs.quranDesc: Systematic study of articulation points (Makharij), phonological attributes, and Tajweed rules. Includes Hifz memorization with verified chains of transmission (Isnad) and Ijaza certification.
Programs.quranBooks: Textbooks Studied: Tuhfat al-Atfal (Tajweed) • Al-Muqaddimah al-Jazariyyah (Phonology) • Al-Shatibiyyah (7 Qira'at)
Programs.arabicDesc: Develop classical linguistic mastery. Covers spelling, vocabulary expansion, and structured study of grammar (Nahw), morphology (Sarf), eloquence (Balaghah), and classical poetry.
Programs.arabicBooks: Textbooks Studied: Al-Ajrumiyyah (Grammar) • Qatr al-Nada (Syntax) • Alfiyyah ibn Malik (Linguistics) • Al-Balaghah al-Wadihah (Rhetoric)
Programs.islamicDesc: Text-based study of foundational Islamic disciplines: jurisprudence (Fiqh) across the four schools, orthodox creed (Aqeedah), prophetic biography (Seerah), and principles of Hadith and Tafsir.
Programs.islamicBooks: Textbooks Studied: Al-Arba'in al-Nawawiyyah (Hadith) • Matn Abi Shuja' (Shafi'i Fiqh) • Al-Aqida al-Wasitiyyah (Theology) • Al-Bayquniyyah (Hadith Terminology)

Method.title: The Tebyan Pedagogy
Method.subtitle: Synthesizing traditional Islamic scholarship with modern interactive technology to ensure deep comprehension.
Method.pillar1Desc: Learning is structured, not random. Students progress systematically through classical texts and matn collections, building a consistent foundation of scientific tools under expert guidance.
Method.pillar2Desc: True sacred knowledge is received from hearts, not screens. We provide direct private contact where your scholar listens to your reading, correcting pronunciation and grammar errors syllable by syllable.
Method.pillar3Desc: We bridge cultural contexts. Our scholars are fluent in English or French, allowing Western professionals and youth to discuss complex jurisprudential questions in the language of their daily lives.

Teachers.title: Our Distinguished Faculty
Teachers.subtitle: Learn directly from certified scholars and reciters with years of university teaching and pedagogical experience.

Pricing.title: Academic Membership Plans
Pricing.subtitle: Flexible monthly memberships with no long-term contracts. Complete transparency and protection of student rights.
Pricing.starterDesc: Ideal for testing the model and maintaining a consistent weekly recitation check.
Pricing.optimalDesc: Our most popular track. Ideal for consistent Quranic memorization, grammar acquisition, and jurisprudence study.
Pricing.intensiveDesc: Designed for dedicated students committed to rapid language acquisition, Quran memorization, or Ijaza tracking.
Pricing.pausingPolicyDesc: Going on vacation or facing exams? Pause your subscription for up to 30 days. Your time slots and assigned scholar will be locked in for your return.
Pricing.makeupPolicyDesc: Reschedule any private lesson free of charge up to 24 hours in advance. The session is credited to your balance to be made up later.
Pricing.trialRefundPolicyDesc: Your assessment session is 100% free. If you subscribe and are not fully satisfied after your first paid session, get a full refund instantly.

Testimonials.title: Student Testimonials of Impact
Testimonials.subtitle: Discover how private scholarly guidance has shaped the academic journeys of our global community.

Booking.title: Book Your Free Academic Assessment
Booking.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary private Zoom session to evaluate your level and draft your learning plan.
Booking.goalsPlaceholder: Please share your current reading level, whether you read Arabic script, and what you wish to accomplish with us...
Booking.successDesc: Your booking request has been successfully recorded. An academic coordinator will email you within 12 hours with your Zoom link, schedule, and scholar details.
Booking.validationName: Full name is required to process the booking
Booking.validationEmail: Please provide a valid email address for coordination
Booking.validationGoals: Please share a brief description of your educational goals

Footer.verse: "And We have sent down to you the Book as a clarification for all things, and as guidance, mercy, and glad tidings for the Muslims." — Quran 16:89
